response.title: Marketing Specialist
response.description: Creative Minds Agency is seeking a motivated and results-driven Marketing Specialist to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for developing and executing marketing strategies that enhance brand visibility and drive customer engagement. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to support various marketing campaigns and initiatives, ensuring alignment with our business objectives.

required_skills: PPC advertising (e.g., Google Ads, Facebook Ads)
preferred_skills: Basic graphic design skills (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite)
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
